sqlMap.select: SELECT t.*, dt1.departname AS unitname1, ut1.staffName AS policename1, dt2.departname AS unitname2, ut2.staffName AS policename2, IFNULL( GROUP_CONCAT( mt.attributelabel ORDER BY mt.id SEPARATOR ' , ' ), '' ) AS personlabelname FROM p_personnel_extend_t t LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t pt ON t.personnelid=pt.id LEFT JOIN sys_department_t dt1 ON pt.jdunit1 = dt1.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t ut1 ON pt.jdpolice1 = ut1.id LEFT JOIN sys_department_t dt2 ON pt.jdunit2 = dt2.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t ut2 ON pt.jdpolice2 = ut2.id LEFT JOIN p_attributelabel_t mt ON ( FIND_IN_SET( mt.id, t.attributelabels ) and mt.validflag>0) WHERE t.validflag > 0 AND t.ID = $id$

SELECT t.*, dt1.departname AS unitname1, ut1.staffName AS policename1, dt2.departname AS unitname2, ut2.staffName AS policename2 ,IFNULL( GROUP_CONCAT( mt.attributelabel ORDER BY mt.id SEPARATOR ' , ' ), '' ) AS personlabelname FROM p_personnel_extend_t t LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t pt ON t.personnelid=pt.id LEFT JOIN sys_department_t dt1 ON pt.jdunit1 = dt1.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t ut1 ON pt.jdpolice1 = ut1.id LEFT JOIN sys_department_t dt2 ON pt.jdunit2 = dt2.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t ut2 ON pt.jdpolice2 = ut2.id LEFT JOIN p_attributelabel_t mt ON ( FIND_IN_SET( mt.id, t.attributelabels ) and mt.validflag>0) WHERE t.validflag > 0 AND t.personnelid = $personnelid$ AND t.personlabelid=$personlabelid$

SELECT COUNT(a.id) FROM (SELECT gt.id FROM p_personnel_extend_t gt LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t pt ON gt.personnelid=pt.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t ut ON pt.jdpolice1=ut.id
LEFT JOIN p_relation_telnumber_t rtt ON (rtt.personnelid=pt.id AND rtt.validflag>0)
WHERE gt.validflag > 0 AND pt.validflag>0
pt.cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
pt.personname like '%$personname$%'
rtt.telnumber like '%$telnumber$%'
pt.homeplace like '%$homeplace$%'
$labelsql$
FIND_IN_SET(pt.jdunit1,'$unitname1$')
ut.staffName like '%$policename1$%'
gt.jointcontrollevel = '$jointcontrollevel$'
gt.country like '%$country$%'
gt.incontrollevel = '$incontrollevel$'
pt.persontype = '$persontype$'
gt.personlabelid=$personlabelid$
(pt.jdunit1 = $unitFilter$ or pt.jdunit2 = $unitFilter$)
(pt.jdpolice1 = $personFilter$ or pt.jdpolice2 = $personFilter$)
GROUP BY gt.id) a

SELECT gt.*,pt.cardnumber,pt.personname,pt.homeplace,pt.persontype,pt.sexes,pt.pphone1, IFNULL(dt.departname,'') AS unitname1,IFNULL(ut.staffName,'') AS policename1, pt.zslabel1 AS unitname2,pt.zslabel2 AS pphone2, IFNULL( GROUP_CONCAT(mt.personlabel order by mt.id SEPARATOR ','), '' ) AS policename2 FROM p_personnel_extend_t gt LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t pt ON gt.personnelid=pt.id LEFT JOIN sys_department_t dt ON pt.jdunit1=dt.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t ut ON pt.jdpolice1=ut.id
LEFT JOIN p_relation_telnumber_t rtt ON (rtt.personnelid=pt.id AND rtt.validflag>0)
LEFT JOIN p_personlabel_t mt ON (FIND_IN_SET(mt.id,pt.personlabel) AND mt.validflag=0 ) WHERE gt.validflag > 0 AND pt.validflag > 0
pt.cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
pt.personname like '%$personname$%'
rtt.telnumber like '%$telnumber$%'
pt.homeplace like '%$homeplace$%'
$labelsql$
FIND_IN_SET(pt.jdunit1,'$unitname1$')
ut.staffName like '%$policename1$%'
gt.jointcontrollevel = '$jointcontrollevel$'
gt.country like '%$country$%'
gt.incontrollevel = '$incontrollevel$'
pt.persontype = '$persontype$'
gt.personlabelid=$personlabelid$
(pt.jdunit1 = $unitFilter$ or pt.jdunit2 = $unitFilter$)
(pt.jdpolice1 = $personFilter$ or pt.jdpolice2 = $personFilter$)
GROUP BY gt.id ORDER BY homeplace desc,persontype desc

SELECT gt.*, pt.personname,pt.cardnumber, pt.sexes,pt.usedname,pt.nickname, pt.marrystatus,pt.nation,pt.soldierstatus, pt.heathstatus,pt.politicalposition,pt.faith, pt.education,pt.persontype,pt.houseplace, pt.housepolice,pt.homeplace,pt.homepolice, pt.workplace,pt.workpolice,pt.feature, pt.speciality,pt.records, pt.personheight,pt.netskillhabit, rt.telnumber,rt.telephone,rt.relatedwifi, rt.relatedvehicle,rt.bankaccount,rt.netidentity, rt.netpayment,rt.relatedhouse,rt.relatedlegal, rt.relateddriver,rt.relatedpassport, dt1.departname AS unitname1,ut1.staffName AS policename1, dt2.departname AS unitname2,ut2.staffName AS policename2 FROM p_personnel_t pt LEFT JOIN p_personnel_extend_t gt ON gt.personnelid=pt.id
LEFT JOIN p_relation_telnumber_t rtt ON (rtt.personnelid=pt.id AND rtt.validflag>0)
LEFT JOIN p_relation_t rt ON gt.personnelid=rt.personnelid LEFT JOIN sys_department_t dt1 ON pt.jdunit1=dt1.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t ut1 ON pt.jdpolice1=ut1.id LEFT JOIN sys_department_t dt2 ON pt.jdunit2=dt2.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t ut2 ON pt.jdpolice2=ut2.id WHERE pt.validflag > 0 and pt.isrisk=1
FIND_IN_SET($personlabelid$,pt.zslabel1)
pt.cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
pt.personname like '%$personname$%'
rtt.telnumber like '%$telnumber$%'
pt.homeplace like '%$homeplace$%'
$labelsql$
gt.jointcontrollevel = '$jointcontrollevel$'
gt.country like '%$country$%'
gt.incontrollevel = '$incontrollevel$'
pt.persontype = '$persontype$'
pt.jdunit1 = $unitFilter$ OR pt.jdunit2 = $unitFilter$
pt.jdpolice1 = $personFilter$ OR pt.jdpolice2 = $personFilter$
GROUP BY pt.id
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_personnel_extend_t (personnelid,jurisdictunit1,jurisdictpolice1,policephone1,personlabelid,attributelabels, validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($personnelid$,$jurisdictunit1$,$jurisdictpolice1$,'$policephone1$',$personlabelid$,'$attributelabels$', $validflag$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_personnel_extend_t SET validflag = 0, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT t.*, GROUP_CONCAT(ft1.fileName ORDER BY ft1.id SEPARATOR ',') AS filesname FROM p_labelinfo_t t LEFT JOIN sys_file_t ft1 ON FIND_IN_SET(ft1.id,t.attachments) WHERE t.validflag = 2 AND t.personnelid = $personnelid$ AND t.customlabelid = $customlabelid$ GROUP BY t.id
SELECT count(t.id) FROM p_labelinfo_t t WHERE t.validflag >0 AND t.personnelid = $personnelid$ AND t.customlabelid = $customlabelid$

SELECT t.*, GROUP_CONCAT(ft1.fileName ORDER BY ft1.id SEPARATOR ',') AS filesname FROM p_labelinfo_t t LEFT JOIN sys_file_t ft1 ON FIND_IN_SET(ft1.id,t.attachments) WHERE t.validflag >0 AND t.personnelid = $personnelid$ AND t.customlabelid = $customlabelid$ GROUP BY t.id ORDER BY t.id desc
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_labelinfo_t (personnelid,customlabelid,labelinfo,attachments, validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($personnelid$,$customlabelid$,'$labelinfo$','$attachments$', $validflag$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_labelinfo_t SET validflag = $validflag$, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
